title: Test Engineer
description:
**Location:**Saronno, IT
**Test Engineer – Healthcare (Surgical)**
 **Saronno, Italy**

Barco Healthcare is looking for a hands‑on Test Engineer to join our R\&D team and support the development and industrialisation of next‑generation surgical products.  

In this role, you will work in an international, multidisciplinary R\&D environment, playing a key part in ensuring product quality, safety, and regulatory compliance throughout the product development lifecycle.

**Your Role**
As a Test Engineer, you will support **New Product Introduction (NPI)** projects by planning, executing, and coordinating verification and validation activities. You will work closely with engineering, industrialisation, quality, and external partners to ensure our products meet **international medical device standards** and Barco’s high‑quality expectations.

**Key Responsibilities**
* Analyse design inputs, project specifications, and regulatory requirements
* Define and execute test plans in collaboration with NPI project managers
* Perform verification and validation testing across different development stages
* Support and execute:
	+ **Environmental testing** (climatic, vibration)
	+ **EMC testing**
	+ **Electrical safety testing**
* Coordinate testing activities with external laboratories and notified bodies
* Conduct gap and conformity analysis against applicable international standards
* Support industrialisation activities, including zero‑series and pre‑series builds
* Contribute to the continuous improvement of testing processes, documentation, and tools
* Collaborate effectively with local teams and Barco headquarters


**Your Profile**
* Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical Engineering, Electronics, or equivalent experience
* Hands‑on experience in a laboratory or test environment
* Exposure to testing, validation, or certification activities
* Ability to work independently, organise work, and take initiative
* Strong communication skills and a structured, analytical mindset
* Fluent in Italian and English

  


**Strong Plus**
* Experience in the **medical device / healthcare industry**
* Familiarity with **EMC, environmental, and electrical safety testing**
* Knowledge of medical device standards (e.g. **IEC 60601 series**)
* Background in testing laboratories, notified bodies, or other regulated industries

  


**What We Offer**
* A role in innovative healthcare technology that directly impacts patient care
* Exposure to cutting‑edge surgical products
* An international working environment with strong cross‑functional collaboration
* Opportunities for learning, development, and internal growth
* Minimal travel requirements

  


️ We are committed to conducting our business activities with the highest standards of integrity, responsibility and compliance across all aspects of our operations. This includes adherence to applicable laws, regulations and internal policies related to ethical conduct, quality standards, cyber security, sustainability, data protection \& confidentiality and safety.


**D\&I Statement**  

At Barco, innovation drives everything we do. We believe that diversity fuels creativity, bringing us closer to our colleagues and customers. Inclusion and equity aren't just values—they're core capabilities that propel us toward our shared goals and mission.
company_description: Barco, a global technology company, designs and develops visualization solutions for a variety of selected professional markets.

title: Event Coordinator Intern
description:
**Additional Locations:** N/A

**Diversity \- Innovation \- Caring \- Global Collaboration \- Winning Spirit \- High Performance**


At Boston Scientific, we’ll give you the opportunity to harness all that’s within you by working in teams of diverse and high\-performing employees, tackling some of the most important health industry challenges. With access to the latest tools, information and training, we’ll help you in advancing your skills and career. Here, you’ll be supported in progressing – whatever your ambitions.

  

At Boston Scientific, you will find a collaborative culture driven by a passion for innovation that keeps us connected on the most essential level. With determination, imagination and a deep caring for human life, we’re solving some of the most important healthcare industry challenges. Together, we’re one global team committed to making a difference in people’s lives around the world. This is a place where you can find a career with meaningful purpose—improving lives through your life’s work.

 **About the Role:**

  

EDUCARE Proctor Bureau (EPB) is a department within Medical Education, dedicated to support Health Care Professional training for new advanced technologies. The core objective of this team is to organize the proctor activities to ensure a smooth execution of a train the trainer program where a Physician expert is used as a consultant to train a Physician in training, in compliance with European and local rules and regulations.

 **Your Responsibilities Will Be:**

  

* (60%) Support the organization the proctoring activity:
* Plan and Perform Proctoring activity \& travel logistics with Boston Scientific Therapy Representatives, Travel Agency \& other partners.
* Manage the proctoring days request across Europe, Middle east, Africa as well as managing the proctor’s availability agenda.
* Contribute to accelerating the exit of doctors in training, in compliance with regulatory rules.
* (30%) Support in management a pool of proctors:
* Establish Healthcare Professionals contracts and administrative documentation according to internal rules and regulations.
* Follow up on proctors’ invoices with supporting documentation and in accordance with internal compliance rules.
* Ensure logistics and communication when organizing meetings/sessions involving proctors.
* Prepare monthly KPI reporting.
* (10%) Follow up on HCP certification in eCare Platform:
* Update Physicians information in eCare platform.
* Collect and report any discrepancies, bugs in eCare.

 **What Are We Looking For In You:**

  

* Graduated in a Master\-Degree in Communication, Sales \& Marketing, or related fields.
* Experience in Medical Device Industry is a plus.
* Fluent in English (B2\+), French is a plus.
* Process development and optimization mindset
* Good knowledge and confidence in Office package
* Customer facing experience with the ability to remain calm under pressure in dealing with issues in a professional manner
* Professionalism and experience in communication with high level stakeholder both through mail than through calls
* Team player

 **What can we offer you:**

  

* A paid internship experience (6 months of duration, renewable for 6 further months);
* Working in an international environment;
* Possibility to make an impact;
* Fast growing and innovative environment;
* A team\-oriented company culture.

 **Location:** in our offices in Milan, on a hybrid working schedule.

**Start date:**June 2026

 *We, Boston Scientific, are an equal employment opportunity employer. We do not and will not make any personnel decisions (like recruiting, hiring, job assignments, and promotions) based on a person’s age, color, national origin, citizenship status, physical or mental disability, race, religion, creed, gender, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or expression, genetic information, marital status, status with regard to public assistance, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local law.*

 **Requisition ID:** 628258

  

Boston Scientific transforms lives through innovative medical technologies that improve the health of patients around the world. As a global medical technology leader for more than 45 years, we advance science for life by providing a broad range of high\-performance solutions that address unmet patient needs and reduce the cost of healthcare. Our portfolio of devices and therapies helps physicians diagnose and treat complex cardiovascular, respiratory, digestive, oncological, neurological and urological diseases and conditions. Learn more at www.bostonscientific.com and follow us on LinkedIn.
company_description: Boston Scientific is dedicated to transforming lives through innovative medical solutions that improve the health of patients around the world.

title: Team Project Coordinator
description:
Want a 3D Career? Join Norgine.


At Norgine, our colleagues Dare themselves to be different and try new things, Drive to achieve their goals and beyond, and Develop themselves and their community.


We call it the 3D career at Norgine and it offers you a fully\-rounded experience with no limits.


Bring everything about yourself that you’re proud of, whether that’s your passion for making a difference, focus on others’ well\-being, or intellectual curiosity to unleash in a fast\-paced environment and supportive community.


In return, get a sense of belonging, a long\-term career with ongoing development and upskilling, and a company that cares about people’s wellness as much as you do.


Because at Norgine, we transform lives with innovative healthcare solutions.


We have an exciting opportunity for a Team Project Coordinator to join Norgine.


* Reports to the General Manager (with a dotted line to the HR Manager for matters relating to personnel administration)
* Direct management of two resources


If you want a multi\-dimensional 3D career in a leading healthcare organisation, join us.  



  

  

**Requirements**  

Organisational Coordination \& People Leadership

* Coordinate the team of assistants, assigning tasks, balancing workloads and monitoring deadlines, quality and priorities. The team of assistants will handle activities involving internal and external stakeholders, as well as staff administrative tasks
* Act as the operational point of contact for all departments within ROC Italy.
* Fulfil a dual role: supervising and directly managing activities both personally and through the team, according to operational needs.
* Monitor and ensure that the team bases its activities on processes, templates and operational SOPs, guaranteeing standardisation and continuous improvement.
* Oversee the schedule, deadlines and deliverables of cross\-functional projects with regular reporting.


The responsibilities and activities of the Team Project Coordinator and the team of assistants include, but are not limited to, the following:


Activities towards internal stakeholders:


Manage all office\-related activities, including the management and preparation of meeting rooms, the organisation of internal meetings (including support in organising national meetings), and organisational coordination with global and external stakeholders.


Internal communication


Foster alignment and engagement among all colleagues through updates and digital channels – intranet, newsletters, town hall meetings, and disease\-specific awareness days


Conferences and educational events – Supervision and operations

* Overseeing conferences and educational events (ECM/non\-ECM) related activities performed by Norgine external congress management partner: liaising with secretariats, AIFA checks and updating congress management systems.
* Direct management of purchase orders and uploads to operational systems.
* Management of travel and hospitality for guests, including selection and negotiation with agencies.
* Support for Farmindustria certification and attendance at audits where required.


Activities involving external stakeholders (supervision \& operations)

* Supervision and support for the organisation of focus groups, market research, advisory boards, consultancy and sponsorship.
* End\-to\-end management of contractual processes: liaising with suppliers/associations/professionals, preparing documentation, collecting signatures and archiving.
* Purchase order management: supplier onboarding, issuance and follow\-up, checks and budget file management.
* Tracking grant requests and liaising with HCPs and scientific societies regarding the contacts necessary to complete the administrative and contractual process.


External communication


Supporting the visibility of the company’s image to external stakeholders – e.g. Norgine Italia website, LinkedIn, etc.


Promotional Materials \& Logistics – Operational Supervision

* Management of shipments and requirements for conference stands.
* Dispatching materials to the sales force.
* Support with the approval process for promotional materials.


Supervision of promotional material stock reconciliation with DHL


Local IT Point – Operational supervision

* Liaising with Global IT regarding PC fleet management and other IT support


Management of relations with external consultants.


Personnel administration (supervision) – in line with HR

* Company car fleet (supervision of external supplier)
* General HR administration


Compliance \& Audit (support to BI\&CM)

* Supporting the operational, documentary and organisational management of compliance processes, facilitating the correct application of internal policies, codes and industry guidelines


Reporting, KPIs \& Continuous Improvement (supervision \& operations)

* Updating the events pipeline, budget vs actual, and supplier KPIs.
* Identifying opportunities for process optimisation and digitalisation.


Role requirements


Education \& Experience


Proven seniority in project/operations coordination within pharmaceutical companies.

* Proven experience in sales support and/or conference management within the pharmaceutical sector.
* Knowledge of codes and regulations within the pharmaceutical sector


Soft skills

* Managerial skills in team management and workload management.
* Collaborative leadership and the ability to create a positive working environment.
* Project management, prioritisation and a results\-oriented approach.
* Problem\-solving and the ability to manage multiple projects in dynamic environments.
* Clear communication, negotiation and excellent customer service.
* Discretion and the ability to interact with all levels of the organisation.
* Confidentiality in handling information

 **Benefits**  

Our benefits may vary per location. Please liaise with the Norgine TA representative to obtain more information.


Sound good? Find out more about the career you’ll have with Norgine, then apply here.

  

\#LI\-PP1
